title: Architecture Manifest
description: Top-level manifest for a file-based Tecture architecture.

description.description: Plain-text description (2-4 paragraphs, separated by \n\n). No markdown.

topDiagram.description: Slug of the entry-point diagram (file name under diagrams/ without .json). Kebab-case.

diagrams.description: All diagram slugs that belong to this architecture.
